scripts.mini-webpack:build: pnpm run build:ts && node dist-ts/src/mini-webpack/build.js examples/basic-app/src/main.js examples/basic-app/dist/bundle.js
scripts.mini-vite:build:circular: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --rootDir . --outDir dist-ts-vite src/types/node-shim.d.ts src/mini-webpack/graph.ts src/mini-vite/scc.ts src/mini-vite/build.ts && node dist-ts-vite/src/mini-vite/build.js examples/circular-app/src/main.js examples/circular-app/vite-dist examples/circular-app
scripts.mini-rsbuild:dev: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --rootDir . --outDir dist-ts-rsbuild src/types/node-shim.d.ts src/mini-webpack/graph.ts src/mini-webpack/bundle.ts src/mini-rsbuild/compiler.ts src/mini-rsbuild/dev-server.ts && node dist-ts-rsbuild/src/mini-rsbuild/dev-server.js
